law: No serious structural problem is considered solved until a dedicated Standards issue agent is registered for recurrence prevention.

incidents.rootCause: Wildcard source rows entered MOVE analysis before concrete file expansion.
incidents.fixApplied: Wildcard expansion now resolves to concrete source_path+target_path rows and group apply consumes expansion artifacts.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Block abstract wildcard MOVE rows unless expansion artifacts produce executable concrete rows.

incidents.rootCause: Receipts, backups, and generated accounting artifacts were included in active inventory/ledger scans.
incidents.fixApplied: Inventory, lineage, and SSA audit generation now exclude receipts, backups, and generated accounting artifacts.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Ensure active accounting only includes system files; never generated artifacts.

incidents.rootCause: Safe tier assignment did not fully enforce cross-repo inbound coupling checks.
incidents.fixApplied: Group coupling gate now blocks members with external inbound importers until regrouped or rewritten.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Validate Tier/Safe labels against actual import graph before apply.

incidents.rootCause: Projection repos held runtime/governance ownership and heavy logic.
incidents.fixApplied: Projection extraction removed nested standards/runtime/governance internals from projection surfaces.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Detect and prevent reintroduction of heavy ownership into projection repos.

incidents.rootCause: Nested LeeWay-Standards copies existed within non-owner repos.
incidents.fixApplied: Nested standards paths removed from active tree and isolated during extraction.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Detect nested governance copies and block recurrence.

incidents.rootCause: Transport files were imported across repo boundaries, blocking direct grouped moves.
incidents.fixApplied: Dependency-map + A/B/C/D subgrouping introduced before apply.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Require dependency-safe subgroup execution for coupled move groups.

incidents.rootCause: Runtime chain assets leaked outside designated runtime ownership boundaries.
incidents.fixApplied: Runtime chain ownership re-centralized in RTC/WebGPU layer boundaries.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Flag runtime assets that reappear outside runtime-designated repos.

incidents.fixApplied: Governance boundaries reinforced; projection and nested copies removed.
incidents.watchResponsibility: Detect and block governance law duplication outside LeeWay-Standards.
